ogTitle: Ellinthorp vs Elliott Heads: Climate Safety

heading: Ellinthorp vs Elliott Heads — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ellinthorp, Queensland and Elliott Heads, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Elliott Heads has a lower overall climate risk score (45/100) compared to Ellinthorp (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ellinthorp or Elliott Heads safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ellinthorp has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Elliott Heads scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ellinthorp scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Elliott Heads scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ellinthorp or Elliott Heads?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Elliott Heads has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
